title: Bayo Alaba - For Southend East and Rochford
h1: Have Your Say! Pride in Shoeburyness
headings: h3: "Stay Informed, Stay Engaged – Follow Us for Updates and the Latest News!"
h3: Stay Informed Southend and Rochford Matters
text_excerpt: Bayo Alaba - For Southend East and Rochford Skip to content → Bayo Alaba Home Pride in Shoeburyness Chair Applications Board Member Applications Have Your Say News Get Help Stay Informed Home Pride in Shoeburyness Chair Applications Board Member Applications Have Your Say News Get Help Stay Informed Have Your Say! Pride in Shoeburyness Your voice is the foundation of this plan. We understand that not everyone has the time or the desire to take on a formal role on the Board, but every person who lives or works in Shoeburyness has a unique perspective on what our community needs most. Whether you have a bold vision for the regeneration of West Road and Ness Road, or you simply want to highlight a small local improvement that would make a big difference to your daily life, we want to hear from you. This questionnaire is your direct line to the decision-making process. By sharing your thoughts, you are ensuring that this £20 million investment is spent on the things that matter most to you and your neighbours. Please take a few minutes to complete the community questionnaire below and help us build a better Shoeburyness together: Community Questionnaire First Name Last Name Email * Postcode * Phone Number 1. How long have you lived in this neighbourhood? — Please choose an option — Less than 1 year 1-5 years 5-10 years More than 10 years 2. In one word, how would you best describe your community? 3. What do you enjoy most about living here? (E.g. community spirit, green spaces, local facilities, location) 4. Which of the following issues matter most to you? (Select up to 3) Local roads and footpaths Crime and anti-social behaviour Public transport Community centres and services Playgrounds and green spaces Health and care services Housing and regeneration Education and employment support Culture and leisure facilities Other (please specify): 5. What is the single most important improvement you’d like to see in your neighbourhood if funding were available? 6. In your view, who are the key people or local groups already doing good work here? 7. Any other thoughts you’d like to share? I would like to be contacted with your newsletter and future announcements. I confirm that I have read and understood the Privacy Notice and understand how my personal data will be used and shared as part of the Pride in Place application process. We will use the information you provide to administer the Pride in Place application process. Your data will be shared with the MP office, Southend City Council, specialist advisers, and the Chair (once selected). Read the full privacy notice here: Board Member Privacy Policy If you have any questions, either before or after you submit this application, please contact us at: [email protected] If you require assistance in completing this application, then please also make contact and we may be able to arrange this. Security Verification: Bayo In Parliament Contributions in parliament from Mr Bayo Alaba Find Out More Proud to be supported by "Stay Informed, Stay Engaged – Follow Us for Updates and the Latest News!"
